notes: Chunk 65 DONE (Template E, Tier B, 25 routes): Caribbean/LatAm outbound to Nordic/Ireland + Jamaica to Central Europe. DO/JM/PA/UY to SE/DK/NO/FI/IE x20; JM to AT/CH/CZ/PL/HU x5. Jamaica listed under EU 2026/636 (no FAVN for EU); Jamaica unlisted under Swiss BLV (FAVN+FSVO for CH). DO/PA/UY unlisted (FAVN+90-day for all). Tapeworm for dogs to NO/FI/IE/HU. Wizz Air no-pets warning for HU. WAW only for PL. Next: Chunk 66 (Template A, Tier B). Blog Day 25 after.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
